subcodes.first_line: O son-in-law of that embodied symbol of faithfulness! Although compelling occupations and urgent duties from every quarter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای صهر آن تمثال مجسم وفا هر چند مشاغل مجبره و تکالیف مبرمه از جمیع جهات الان
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom
